---
title: "Milestone 9: Attribution Module Memo"
author: "Kayla Cortez, Matthew Melgar, Jamie Min, Mehrnoosh Solgi, Roxana Rodriguez"
date: today
format:
  html:
   theme: cosmo
   toc: true
   toc-depth: 4
   number-sections: false
   code-line-numbers: true
   code-link: true
   code-fold: false
   embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute:
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
---
